note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left lower leg wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Venous venous Left lower leg measures 7.3 cm x 5.0 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 37% slough, 63% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Venous venous Left lower leg — improving.
Plan: Physician notified of wound progression. Offloading boot applied.
